(ई.एस. सैल)] िब瀉लब कुमार न瀡कर, अवर सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) म犆 सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 381(अ), तारीख 27 जून, 2006 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और उसम犆 सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 929(अ), तारीख 29 琈दस瀓बर, 2009, सा.का.िन. 763(अ), तारीख 15 िसत瀓बर, 2010, सा.का.िन. 957(अ), तारीख 7 琈दस瀓बर, 2010, सा.का.िन. 735(अ), तारीख 1 अ猴ूबर, 2012 और सा.का.िन. 30(अ), तारीख 17 जनवरी, 2014 獧ारा प玑ातवत牸 संशोधन 琈कये गये । MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th August, 2014 G.S.R. 564(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (ii) of section 66 of the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002 (15 of 2003), the Central Government, on being satisfied that it is necessary in the public interest so to do, hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 381(E) dated the 27th June, 2006, namely :— In the said notification, after serial number (17) and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be inserted, namely:— “(18) Special Investigation Team constituted vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-I, Section-1 vide number F.No.11/2/2009-Ad. E.D. dated the 29th May, 2014.”. [F. No. P.12011/2/2009-S.O.(E.S. Cell)] BIPLAB KUMAR NASKAR, Under Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (i), vide number G.S.R. 381(E), dated the 27th June, 2006 and subsequently amended vide number G.S.R. 929(E), dated the 29th December, 2009, G.S.R. 763(E), dated the 15th September, 2010, G.S.R. 957(E), dated the 7th December, 2010, G.S.R. 735(E), dated the 1st October, 2012 and G.S.R. 30(E), dated the 17th January, 2014.
